title: hieracium sagittatum subsp. subcanipes
intro: Hieracium sagittatum subsp. subcanipes, also known as the hawkweed or milkweed hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which have been utilized to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Hieracium sagittatum subsp. subcanipes include its potential to reduce swelling and pain, as well as its ability to aid in the treatment of wounds and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used as a tea, or made into a tincture or ointment to harness its medicinal properties.
